content: Ayrenn: Ah, the stench of Nordic ignorance clings to you like cheap perfume, Lydia. Can't your kind tell when a ruin reeks of Thalmor presence? Lydia: Piss off, elf. Dibella’s tits, you’re lucky MJR likes pretty faces, or I’d cleave that smug look right off yours. This is Nord land, and your kind slithering around just invites trouble. Ayrenn: Nord land Lydia: Order? You mean shackling Skyrim to your pansy-ass elven overlords? I’d rather take a Draugr’s cock up my ass than bend knee to the Thalmor. Ayrenn: Spoken like a true savage. Tell me, does your Thane know his housecarl fantasizes about undead defilement? Or is that just another filthy Nordic bedtime story? Lydia: Oh, MJR knows exactly how I like it—rough and bloody, just like my politics. Unlike you, I don’t need magic tricks to please my man. A real woman fights fucks with passion. Ayrenn: How… quaint. But do remind him the Dominion doesn’t take kindly to unwashed barbarians meddling in affairs beyond their comprehension. Lydia: Hah! I’ll let him in your affairs when he splits your high-and-mighty Thalmor cunt open like a ripe melon. Now move along before I decide to test that theory.
